definitions: 招致，遭受，承担（不良后果、损失、风险、费用等）

examples.text: According to psychology, what do people strive to do following the initial stage of their life? A) Fulfill individual needs without incurring adverse effects of human drives.
examples.explanation: 这里的 incurring 是 incur 的现在分词，接在 without 后面，表示“在不招致……的情况下”。without incurring adverse effects of human drives 可理解为“不至于招致人类本能驱动力带来的负面影响”。其中 adverse effects 表示“负面影响、不良后果”。
